user_query: 没有现成工具能很好处理我的 Perturb-seq 药物处理前后非线性响应，我想借鉴已有单细胞算法设计一个保守的迁移分析路线。

parsed_constraints.output_goal: perturbation-associated expression effects with evidence caveats
clarification_questions: 请明确实验或测序平台，例如 10x、Smart-seq2、Nanopore 或 PacBio。
请明确输入数据对象或文件格式，例如 h5ad、SeuratObject、FASTQ/BAM 或 fragments。
请提供大致数据规模，例如细胞数、spot 数或样本数。
请说明数据质量或噪声水平，例如 dropout、批次效应或低质量细胞是否严重。
请说明可用硬件，例如 CPU、GPU 或高内存服务器。
请说明物种，例如 human、mouse 或 cross-species。

items.source_title: Perturb-Seq: Dissecting Molecular Circuits with Scalable Single-Cell RNA Profiling of Pooled Genetic Screens

migration_paths.features: Additive perturbation-effect modeling can seed conservative treatment/control response hypotheses.

items.source_title: Migration hypothesis for MIMOSCA -> Perturbation Differential Expression

limitations: Captures only additive linear shifts; misses nonlinear epistasis and multimodal response landscapes.
Accepted as exploratory native mechanism. Must state that strong nonlinear epistasis, multimodal responses, or complex modern perturbation designs can invalidate the linear additive model.
migration_paths.transferable_mechanism: Additive perturbation-effect modeling can seed conservative treatment/control response hypotheses.
compatibility_gaps: requires explicit perturbation labels
nonlinear epistasis or multimodal responses must be caveated
migration_paths.claim_boundary: Exploratory MigrationHypothesis only; not a formal recommendation and not benchmark-backed performance evidence.

migration_paths.features: Smooth lineage-wise regression can transfer to ordered perturbation, dose, or time-response settings with explicit continuous covariates.

items.source_title: Migration hypothesis for tradeSeq -> Perturbation Differential Expression

limitations: Does not infer trajectories; requires high-confidence external pseudotime and lineage weights.
Strong-condition exploratory accept. Only valid for continuous gradient or time-exposure perturbation designs; forbid direct use for unordered discrete perturbation classes.
migration_paths.transferable_mechanism: Smooth lineage-wise regression can transfer to ordered perturbation, dose, or time-response settings with explicit continuous covariates.
compatibility_gaps: requires ordered dose or time covariate
block unordered discrete KO labels from using this mechanism
migration_paths.claim_boundary: Exploratory MigrationHypothesis only; not a formal recommendation and not benchmark-backed performance evidence.

items.source_title: Perturb-Seq: Dissecting Molecular Circuits with Scalable Single-Cell RNA Profiling of Pooled Genetic Screens

items.source_title: Cell2location maps fine-grained cell types in spatial transcriptomics
Benchmarking spatial and single-cell transcriptomics integration methods for transcript distribution prediction and cell type deconvolution
items.metric_value: cell2location is supported as among the top-performing methods for cell type deconvolution of spots, alongside SpatialDWLS and RCTD; do not claim unique best.
items.dataset_scope: Spatial Deconvolution | Spatial Transcriptomics | 45 paired spatial-scRNA-seq datasets and 32 simulated datasets | Spot cell type deconvolution benchmark

items.source_title: Migration hypothesis for moscot -> Spatial Deconvolution

limitations: Computational cost can scale quadratically with cells and depends heavily on user-defined cost matrices.

migration_paths.transferable_mechanism: Flexible cost design can transfer to spatial, temporal, or cross-modality mapping problems where direct tools are immature.
compatibility_gaps: requires manually tuned fused cost matrix over spatial physical distance and omics similarity
migration_paths.claim_boundary: Exploratory MigrationHypothesis only; not a formal recommendation and not benchmark-backed performance evidence.

items.source_title: MOFA+: a statistical framework for comprehensive integration of multi-modal single-cell data

items.metric_value: In this benchmark, MOFA should not be described as the overall best clustering method; intNMF is strongest for sample clustering and MCIA is broadly robust. items.source_title: MOFA+: a statistical framework for comprehensive integration of multi-modal single-cell data
Benchmarking joint multi-omics dimensionality reduction approaches for the study of cancer
items.metric_value: In this benchmark, MOFA should not be described as the overall best clustering method; intNMF is strongest for sample clustering and MCIA is broadly robust. MOFA is supported as useful for sparse, biologically interpretable latent factors and for identifying clinically or survival-associated molecular features across multi-omics layers.
items.metric_unit: Adjusted Rand Index; C-index; log-rank p-value; enrichment score
items.dataset_scope: Multiome Integration;Joint Dimensionality Reduction | multi-omics bulk cancer;single-cell multi-omics | Simulated multi-omics datasets, TCGA cancer multi-omics datasets, and multi-omics single-cell cancer cell line data | joint dimensionality reduction benchmark; bounded factor interpretability support, not overall-best ranking
